title: Aqua Colored Crosshair
description: A aqua colored raticle that can add a fantastic tint to your game!
body:
simple Crosshair for 1.8.9! the color is aqua to add a bit of spice for anyone bored with a normal bedwars game. if you dont like this color you can find the white version on list.

Please email me here with any issues: wowmoonwow@proton.me
